text: [t was narrated that Sa'eed bin Wahb. and Zaid bin Yuthai" said: Al adiured the people at arRahbah, saying: Whoever heard the messenger of Allah (®) speak on the day of Ghadeer Khumm, let him stand up. And (of the people) around Sa'eed, six men stood up, and (of the people) around Zaid, six men stood up, and they tesified that they had heard the Messenger of Allah (#) say to Al (<= &1 =) on the day of Ghadeer Khumm. “lsrt it Alah Who is closer 1o the believers?” They said: Yes. He saic: 0 Allah, if | am a persor's mawia (friend and supporter) then ‘Al is also his mawlz; O Allah, take as friends those who take him as a friend, and take a5 enemies those who take him as an enemy.” A hadeeth like that of Abu Ishaq was arrated from “Amr Dhi Mur, i, from Saeed and Zaid, and he added to it: “and support those who support him, and forsake those who forsake him™ A similar report was narrated from Abut-Tufal from Zaid bin Arqam from the Prophet (8). Grade: Sahih because of corroborating evidence] (Darussalam) Reference : Musnad Ahmad 950, 951, 952
